title: After the Mile Ch.: The Name of That Wind

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Even though I lost—even though I'm
frustrated—my heart feels so light.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I just can't help but be impressed with her. She
really was like the wind...)

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay, Flower? You're breathing quite
heavily.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm fine... But, um, more importantly...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Zephyr! My heart's pounding so
hard...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I don't even know what to say. You flew by
everybody, just like the wind.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That's the greatest compliment I could ever
receive. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I want to go beyond this... and that desire is what
gave me the strength to win.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
...The next time we meet will be at the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
My Mile Championship was a success. And in my
next sprint...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I will be even fiercer, even more tempestuous. I
shall take it by storm.
